title: Commit window opened for source-authority bundle
body: Opened git index/head claim 2154189d-15c4-4170-ac55-d7eabac2048d. Intended pathspecs are the graph/EEF ADR and plan updates, repository-held EEF snapshot metadata, handoff surfaces, and this session's comms events. Staged set was empty before opening; commit queue had no active entries; one active agentic-engineering claim has no file overlap.
